adjudication.root_cause: V4 fixed the eligibility subject and most action ambiguity, but listed residual enum names without operational definitions. The model substituted two semantically adjacent residuals. Quarantine also lacked an explicit requirement that an affected artifact or cohort must be isolated and preserved.
adjudication.why_not_rescore: The prospective evaluator required exact action and residual fields and the 7/8 floor was not met.

prospective_v5_requirements: Define each residual class operationally and require the most specific matching definition.
Require quarantine only when an affected cohort or artifact must be isolated and preserved; use defer for a replaceable contaminated evaluation that has not supported release.
Preserve the full-request eligibility definition that matched 8/8 and all unchanged one-shot, isolation, floor, and non-claim boundaries.
non_claims: Six exact tuples do not qualify the instrument.
No campaign or support claim follows.
